detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Tweet._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Tweet.sol#667-791):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Tweet.sol#731)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Tweet.sol#805-817)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Tweet.sol#737)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Tweet.sol#825)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Tweet.sol#789)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Tweet.sol#951)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Tweet.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Tweet.sol#933)
	Tweet._rOwned (Tweet.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Tweet._takeTeam(uint256) (Tweet.sol#945-953)
	- Tweet._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Tweet.sol#905-941)
	- Tweet.balanceOf(address) (Tweet.sol#493-497)
	- Tweet.constructor() (Tweet.sol#427-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Tweet.sol#789)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Tweet.sol#959)
	Tweet._rTotal (Tweet.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Tweet._getCurrentSupply() (Tweet.sol#1101-1111)
	- Tweet._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Tweet.sol#957-963)
	- Tweet.constructor() (Tweet.sol#427-457)
	- Tweet.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Tweet.sol#589-611)
detectors.markdown:

	- [Tweet.balanceOf(address)](Tweet.sol#L493-L497)
	- [Tweet.constructor()](Tweet.sol#L427-L457)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Tweet.sol#L789)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Tweet.sol#L959)

	- [Tweet._getCurrentSupply()](Tweet.sol#L1101-L1111)
	- [Tweet._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Tweet.sol#L957-L963)
